name: Chicken Parmesan with Mushroom Marsala Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Eggs, beaten in a medium bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the bread crumbs, seasoning, and cheese on a plate.
2. Coat each chicken piece with flour, dip in egg mixture, then coat with the breadcrumb mixture. Place on wax paper and let stand in the refrigerator for 2-3 hours.
3. Place pats of butter in the middle of a skillet and arrange olive oil around the butter.
4. Fry the chicken until golden brown.
5. Sauce: Sauté mushrooms in butter. Add wine. Stir until hot.
6. Serve the sauce separately, allowing guests to pour it over their chicken.
